title: Fountain Of End
description: This Fountain Of End is Called Enderlings...
body:
# Fountain Of End
![Fountain Of End](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Txm6koDV/images/392c1f553fb0a40e99edfaf46e6cb8bb76ae6006.png)
# Summary
This fountain will only generate in any overworld biome (only generate in world gen of course).

That Fountain is Enderling's Outpost. Enderling is Descendant of the Enderman. also known as Monsters transformed by the spring

Fountain spread End Biome and void... if you found those. You need break it

Of course This Fountain can break. but be carefull... Enderling will angry about it...

## Enderling

### Watchling(From Dungeons)

This monster has many eyes. be carefull if you even see the body's eyes. you will danger...

### Snearling(From Dungeons)

The liquid he gives you will immobilize you, and once you are immobilized they will attack you.

## How this mod made?

The concept is a cross the idea between Deltarune's dark fountain and Minecraft's The End.
